questionHtml: Calculate the change in producer surplus resulting from the increase in costs of production.
markschemeHtml:
(0.5 × 20 × 60 000) − (0.5 × 20 × 90 000)

Any valid working is sufficient for [1].

= −$300 000 (or a decrease of $300 000)

An answer of  −$300 000 or −300 000 without any working is sufficient for [1].

meta.title: Calculate the change in producer surplus resulting from the increase in costs of production.
